original: Woven with highly advanced, threaded thermal generators, this cozy cock sock’s technology can protect you from the worst of Uveto’s harsh temperatures, though it does nothing for more concentrated thermal attacks. So soft and warm, it doubles as a sleeping sock! Grants a small protection against environmental cold. Rest recovers additional +5% HP and Energy.
